person.name: Malcolm Beg Drummond 6th Thane of Lennox

nameForms.fullText: Malcolm Beg Drummond 6th Thane of Lennox

popularStory.headline: The Beg Drummond
popularStory.description:
Sexto senescal de Lennox, †antes de 1270, primeiro personagem atestado documentalmente nesta
família. C.c. Ada, filha de Baldwin, conde de Lennox, sobrinha de John the Stewart.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Malcolm Beg Drummond 6th Thane of Lennox於1190年出生在蘇格蘭斯林史爾德門時，他的父親Sir Malcolm Drummond 5th Thane of Lennox26歲，母親Margaret Lindsay30歲。他於1237年之前與Findoig Macgillivrail在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1259年在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾德門享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Malcolm Beg Drummond 6th Thane of Lennox于1190年出生在苏格兰斯林史爾德門时，他的父亲Sir Malcolm Drummond 5th Thane of Lennox26岁，母亲Margaret Lindsay30岁。他于1237年之前与Findoig Macgillivrail在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1259年在英国苏格兰斯林史爾德門享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Drummond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places, notably the barony of Drummond, which is probably identical with the parish of Drymen (Stirlingshire), named from Gaelic drumainn, a derivative of druim ‘ridge’. It has been said that the principal family of this name are descended from a Hungarian nobleman, Maurice, who accompanied Edgar Atheling and his sister Margaret to Scotland in 1068, where she married King Malcolm III. However, there is disagreement on whether or not this was the case.

English: occasionally perhaps from an unrecorded Middle English personal name Dromund (Old Norse Drómundr, apparently from a word denoting a kind of Byzantine galley prevalent till the 12th cent., from Greek dromōn ‘runner’).

variants.name: Drummonds
meanings: Scottish: variant of Drummond , with post-medieval excrescent -s. In Britain this surname is found mainly in County Durham.

nameMeanings.name: Malcolm
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the medieval Gaelic name Mael Coluim ‘devotee of St Columba’. Columba was a 6th-century monk of Irish origin who played a leading part in the conversion to Christianity of Scotland and northern England; see also Callum and Colm . He has always been one of the most popular saints in Scotland, but in the Middle Ages it was felt to be presumptuous to give the names of saints directly to children; instead their blessing was invoked by prefixing the name with mael ‘devotee of’ or gille ‘servant of’. Since the 1930s the given name has been used widely in the English-speaking world, not just by those with Scottish connections.

nameMeanings.name: Beg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Yiddish ber ‘bear’, probably influenced by the early medieval European practice of giving animal names to people. It is often paired with Dov in order to provide a Hebrew name in certain rituals.

en.lifeSummary: When Malcolm Beg Drummond 6th Thane of Lennox was born in 1190, in Drymen, Stirlingshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Malcolm Drummond 5th Thane of Lennox, was 26 and his mother, Margaret Lindsay, was 30. He married Findoig Macgillivrail before 1237, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1259, in Drymen, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Malcolm Beg Drummond 6th Thane of Lennox est né en 1190, à Drymen, Stirlingshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Malcolm Drummond 5th Thane of Lennox, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Lindsay, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Findoig Macgillivrail avant 1237, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1259, à Drymen, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Malcolm Beg Drummond 6th Thane of Lennox 1190 in Drymen, Stirlingshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Malcolm Drummond 5th Thane of Lennox 26 und seine Mutter Margaret Lindsay 30. Er hat vor 1237 in Scotland Findoig Macgillivrail geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1259 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Drymen, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Malcolm Beg Drummond 6th Thane of Lennox è nato il nel 1190 nel Drymen, Stirlingshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Malcolm Drummond 5th Thane of Lennox, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Lindsay, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Findoig Macgillivrail prima del 1237, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1259, nel Drymen, Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Malcolm Beg Drummond 6th Thane of Lennoxが1190年にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアドリメンで生まれた時，父Sir Malcolm Drummond 5th Thane of Lennoxは26歳，母Margaret Lindsayは30歳であった。1237年以前にスコットランドでFindoig Macgillivrailと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1259年にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアドリメンで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Malcolm Beg Drummond 6th Thane of Lennox(이)가 1190년 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 드리멘에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Malcolm Drummond 5th Thane of Lennox(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Lindsay(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1237년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Findoig Macgillivrail(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1259년 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 드리멘에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Malcolm Beg Drummond 6th Thane of Lennox nasceu em 1190, em Drymen, Stirlingshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Malcolm Drummond 5th Thane of Lennox, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Lindsay, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Findoig Macgillivrail antes 1237, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1259, em Drymen, Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Malcolm Beg Drummond 6th Thane of Lennox родился в 1190 г. в местности дримен, стирлингшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Malcolm Drummond 5th Thane of Lennox было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Lindsay, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Findoig Macgillivrail перед 1237 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1259 г. в местности дримен, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет.

Se casó con Findoig Macgillivrail antes de 1237, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1259, en Drymen, Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años.
